response.original_title: ONE DAY: The Monks' Life at the Abbey of Gethsemani
response.overview: The Abbey of Our Lady of Gethsemani is a Catholic monastery in the United States near Bardstown, Kentucky, in Nelson County. The abbey is part of the Order of Cistercians of the Strict Observance, better known as the Trappists.  Through rich photography and with few words ONE DAY immerses the viewer in the flow of monastic life. This unique film was patiently shot by one of the monks over the course of several months.
response.title: ONE DAY: The Monks' Life at the Abbey of Gethsemani
